title: 48 MCT to 1mL Vial
author: Opentrons
materials: Specify your parameters on this page.
Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: This is one of three protocols...
steps.instruction: This is one of three protocols updated from protocols developed with Protocol Designer. The three protocols are: [48 MCT to 1mL Vial](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/6b8c90) [48 Samples to MCT](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/6b8c90-2) [EtOH 48 Sample to 1mL Vial](https://develop.protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/6b8c90-3) In this protocol, the p300-single channel pipette is used to transfer 300µL between the acrylic Opentrons tuberack and a custom 1mL tube rack. --- To purchase tips, reagents, or pipettes, please visit our [online store](https://shop.opentrons.com/) or contact our sales team at [info@opentrons.com](mailto:info@opentrons.com) * [P300 Single-Channel Pipette (GEN1)](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) * [Opentrons 300µl Pipette tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips) * Opentrons Acrylic Tube Rack * Custom 1mL Tube Rack + Tubes --- **Deck Layout** **Slot 2**: Opentrons Acrylic Tube Rack (for samples 1-24) **Slot 3**: Custom 1mL Tube Rack + Tubes (for samples 1-24) **Slot 5**: Opentrons Acrylic Tube Rack (for samples 25-48) **Slot 6**: Custom 1mL Tube Rack + Tubes (for samples 25-48) **Slot 7**: [Opentrons 300µl Pipette tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips)

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.
